title: Amazing Grace
body:
Verse 1
A[G]mazing grace, how [C]sweet the [G]sound
That saved a wretch like [D]me
I [G]once was lost, but [C]now am [G]found
Was [Em]blind but [D]now I [G]see

Verse 2
'Twas [G]grace that taught my [C]heart to [G]fear
And grace my fears re[D]lieved
How [G]precious did that [C]grace ap[G]pear
The [Em]hour I [D]first be[G]lieved

Verse 3
Through [G]many dangers, [C]toils and [G]snares
I have already [D]come
'Tis [G]grace hath brought me [C]safe thus [G]far
And [Em]grace will [D]lead me [G]home

Verse 4
When [G]we've been there ten [C]thousand [G]years
Bright shining as the [D]sun
We've [G]no less days to [C]sing God's [G]praise
Than [Em]when we'd [D]first be[G]gun

title: Another Like You (Live)
body:
Verse 1
[Ab]  You embodied[Db] the fullness of God
[Ab]  Wrapped in mercy,[Db] You showed us Your heart
[Fm7]  Your [Eb]love upon the[Db] cross
[Fm7]  Your [Eb]love poured out for[Db] all
Chorus
[Ab]  There is no one like [Db]the Lord our God
[Fm7]  You've been faithful every [Db]day of my life
[Ab] Oh, I could search the world and [Db]never find
An[Bbm7]other like You, an[Db] other like you
Instrumental
[Ab  |  C  |  G  |  C]
Verse 2
[Ab]  You set a table[Db] and invite us to come
[Ab]  Your body broken,[Db] Your blood was enough
[Fm7]  Oh this [Eb]love upon the [Db]cross
[Fm7]  Oh this [Eb]love poured out for [Db]all

CHORUS (2x)





Instrumental
[Ab][|][Bbm7][|][Ab/C][|][Db]
Bridge
Oh [Ab]worthy is the Lamb, [Bbm7]worthy is the King
[Ab/C]Worthy is the One who [Db]reigns forever
He's [Ab]seated on the throne, [Bbm7]He's high above it all
And [Ab/C]everyone will know that You're [Db]like no other
(3x)

Chorus
[Ab]  There is no one like [Db]the Lord our God
[Fm7]  You've been faithful every [Db]day of my life
[Ab] Oh, I could search the world and [Db]never find
An[Bbm7]other like You, an[Db] other like you
(2x)

title: Be Thou My Vision
body:
Verse 1
[D]Be Thou my [A/C#]vision, O [Bm]Lord of my [G]heart
[D]Naught be all [G]else to me [A]save that Thou [D]art
[Bm]Thou my best [G]thought, by [D]day or by [A]night
[D]Waking or [G]sleeping, Thy [A]presence my [D]light

Verse 2
[D]Be Thou my [A/C#]wisdom, and [Bm]Thou my true [G]word
[D]I ever [G]with Thee and [A]Thou with me, [D]Lord
[Bm]Thou my great [G]Father, and [D]I Thy true [A]son
[D]Thou in me [G]dwelling, and [A]I with Thee [D]one

Verse 3
[D]High King of [A/C#]heaven, my [Bm]victory [G]won
[D]May I reach [G]heaven's joys, O [A]bright heaven's [D]Sun
[Bm]Heart of my [G]own heart, what[D]ever be[A]fall
[D]Still be my [G]vision, O [A]Ruler of [D]all

title: Come Thou Fount of Every Blessing
body:
Verse 1
[D]Come Thou fount of [G]every [D]blessing
Tune my [G]heart to [D]sing Thy [A]grace
[D]Streams of mercy, [G]never [D]ceasing
Call for [G]songs of [A]loudest [D]praise
Teaching me the [G]tuneful [D]sonnet
Sung by [G]flaming [D]tongues a[A]bove
[D]Praise the mount, I'm [G]fixed up[D]on it
Mount of [G]Thy re[A]deeming [D]love

Verse 2
[D]Here I raise my [G]Ebe[D]nezer
Hither [G]by Thy [D]help I'm [A]come
[D]And I hope by [G]Thy good [D]pleasure
Safely [G]to ar[A]rive at [D]home
Jesus sought me [G]when a [D]stranger
Wandering [G]from the [D]fold of [A]God
[D]He to rescue [G]me from [D]danger
Inter[G]posed His [A]precious [D]blood

Verse 3
[D]O to grace how [G]great a [D]debtor
Daily [G]I'm con[D]strained to [A]be
[D]Let Thy goodness, [G]like a [D]fetter
Bind my [G]wandering [A]heart to [D]Thee
Prone to wander, [G]Lord I [D]feel it
Prone to [G]leave the [D]God I [A]love
[D]Here's my heart, O [G]take and [D]seal it
Seal it [G]for Thy [A]courts a[D]bove

title: Holy Holy Holy
body:
Verse 1
[D]Holy, holy, [Bm]holy! [D]Lord God Al[A]mighty!
[D]Early in the [G]morning our [D]song shall [A]rise to [D]Thee
[D]Holy, holy, [Bm]holy! [D]Merciful and [A]mighty!
[D]God in three [G]Persons, [D]blessed [A]Trini[D]ty!

Verse 2
[D]Holy, holy, [Bm]holy! [D]All the saints a[A]dore Thee
[D]Casting down their [G]golden crowns a[D]round the [A]glassy [D]sea
[D]Cherubim and [Bm]seraphim [D]falling down be[A]fore Thee
[D]Which wert and [G]art and [D]ever[A]more shalt [D]be

Verse 3
[D]Holy, holy, [Bm]holy! Though the [D]darkness [A]hide Thee
[D]Though the eye of [G]sinful man Thy [D]glory [A]may not [D]see
[D]Only Thou art [Bm]holy, [D]there is none be[A]side Thee
[D]Perfect in [G]power, in [D]love and [A]puri[D]ty

title: It Is Well With My Soul
body:
Verse 1
When [C]peace like a [F]river at[C]tendeth my [G]way
When [C]sorrows like [F]sea billows [G]roll
What[C]ever my [C/E]lot, Thou hast [F]taught me to [Dm]say
It is [C]well, [G]it is well with my [C]soul

Chorus
It is [C]well ([F]it is [C]well)
With my [G]soul (with my [C]soul)
It is [F]well, it is [C]well [G]with my [C]soul

Verse 2
Though [C]Satan should [F]buffet, though [C]trials should [G]come
Let [C]this blest as[F]surance con[G]trol
That [C]Christ hath re[C/E]garded my [F]helpless es[Dm]tate
And hath [C]shed His own [G]blood for my [C]soul

Verse 3
And [C]Lord, haste the [F]day when my [C]faith shall be [G]sight
The [C]clouds be rolled [F]back as a [G]scroll
The [C]trump shall re[C/E]sound and the [F]Lord shall des[Dm]cend
Even [C]so, it is [G]well with my [C]soul

title: Jesus My Everything
body:
Verse 1
[G]  What can satis[C]fy, what only You can [G/B]fill
The longing to be kn[C]own again
[G]  Desperately I s[C]eek, a cup that won't run [G]dry
Fill me with Your l[C]ove again
Pre-Chorus 1
[Am]  Puri[G/B]fy my [C]heart
[G/B]My one de[C]sire, to [Em]lay at Your [D] feet
Chorus
[G]Jesus, I give to[D] You
Every part of [Em]me, My [G/B]every[C]thing
Sur[G]render all my [D]crowns
Count it all as [Em]loss, You're [G/B]every[C]thing
Verse 2
[G]  What can bear the [C]weight, Of all my sin and [G/B]shame, There's only one found [C]worthy
[G]  There upon that [C]tree, Your blood poured out for [G/B]me, You rose to bring me  [C]back to life
Pre-Chorus 1 (1x)
Pre-Chorus 2
[Am]  Puri[G/B]fy my [C]heart
No [G/B]matter the [C]cost, You're the [Em]only song I s[D]ing
Chorus (2x)
Instrumental
[C][|][D][|][Em][|][G/B][(2x)]
Bridge 1
All my [C]hopes, all my dreams
Sur[D]rendered at Your feet
Every [Em]heartache and defeat
Lord, [G/B]have Your way in me (8x)
Instrumental
[C][|][D][|][Em][|][G/B][(2x)]
Bridge 1(1x)
Bridge 2
I was [Am]made to bring You glory
For [G/B]all eternity
[Em]Jesus You are [D]worth my [G]every[C]thing
You're all I [D]need

title: What a Friend We Have in Jesus
body:
Verse 1
[F]What a friend we [Bb]have in [F]Jesus
All our sins and [C]griefs to [F]bear
What a privilege to [Bb]car[F]ry
Everything to [C]God in [F]prayer
[C]O what peace we [F]often for[Bb]feit
[F]O what needless [C]pain we [F]bear
All because we [Bb]do not [F]carry
Everything to [C]God in [F]prayer

Verse 2
[F]Have we trials and [Bb]tempta[F]tions?
Is there trouble [C]any[F]where?
We should never be dis[Bb]cour[F]aged
Take it to the [C]Lord in [F]prayer
[C]Can we find a [F]friend so [Bb]faithful
[F]Who will all our [C]sorrows [F]share?
Jesus knows our [Bb]every [F]weakness
Take it to the [C]Lord in [F]prayer

title: Doxology
body:
Verse 1
[G]Praise God from [D]whom all [Em]blessings [C]flow
[G]Praise Him all [C]creatures [D]here be[G]low
[Em]Praise Him a[D]bove ye [G]heavenly [D]host
[G]Praise Father, [C]Son and [D]Holy [G]Ghost
A[C]men, [G/D]A[D]men, [G]Amen
